title: 13. About Dialog Enhancement
original_text: Yes, that wording is fine, and I’ve now wired the idea into the app. In [app.py]..., `Help > About` now includes: original C++ credit... Python/PyQt6 port credit... clickable author names using `mailto:` links... GPL notice... a short “Technologies used in this port” section... I also updated the help-guide text... and expanded [test_app_playlist.py]... Verification is clean: ... 136 tests OK...
expected_subject: docs(app): enhance About dialog with credits and tech
expected_body_lines: - Add C++ and Python/PyQt6 port credits with clickable mailto links
- Hide emails via hover text while keeping names visible
- Include GPL notice and 'Technologies used' section
- Update user guides (EN/ES) to reflect new About content
- Add tests for credit presence, links, and technology list
- Validation: compileall OK, 136 tests pass, offscreen verified
expected_command:
git commit -m "docs(app): enhance About dialog with credits and tech" \
  -m "- Add C++ and Python/PyQt6 port credits with clickable mailto links" \
  -m "- Hide emails via hover text while keeping names visible" \
  -m "- Include GPL notice and 'Technologies used' section" \
  -m "- Update user guides (EN/ES) to reflect new About content" \
  -m "- Add tests for credit presence, links, and technology list" \
  -m "- Validation: compileall OK, 136 tests pass, offscreen verified"
